2605.24883.title: Inverting the Shield: Systematically Generating Safety Tests from Policy Specifications
2605.24883.paper_summary: The widespread integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) necessitates rigorous and systematic safety evaluation. Existing paradigms either rely on constructed benchmarks to assess safety from predefined perspectives, or employ dynamic red-teaming to probe potential vulnerabilities. While effective, these approaches face challenges, as they depend heavily on expert domain knowledge, offer limited systematic guarantees, and are vulnerable to rapid obsolescence. To address these limitations, we introduce a novel framework POLARIS that brings the rigor of specification-based software testing to AI safety. POLARIS first compiles unstructured natural-language policies into First-Order Logic (FOL) representations, establishing a traceable link between high-level rules and concrete test cases. This formalization enables the construction of a Semantic Policy Graph, where complex policy violation scenarios are encoded as traversable paths. By systematically exploring this graph, POLARIS uncovers compositional violation patterns, which are then instantiated into executable natural-language test queries, enabling coverage-driven and reproducible safety testing. Experiments demonstrate that POLARIS achieves higher policy coverage and attack success counts compared to established baselines. Crucially, by bridging formal methods and AI safety, POLARIS provides a principled, automated approach to ensuring LLMs adhere to safety-critical policies with verifiable traceability. We release our code at https://github.com/huac-lxy/POLARIS.
2605.24883.paper_summary_zh: 廣泛整合大型語言模型（LLMs）需要嚴謹且系統化的安全評估。現有的範式要麼依賴構建的基準來從預定義的角度評估安全性，要麼採用動態紅隊測試來探查潛在的漏洞。雖然這些方法有效，但面臨挑戰，因為它們在很大程度上依賴專家的領域知識，提供有限的系統性保證，並且容易迅速過時。為了解決這些限制，我們引入了一個新框架POLARIS，將基於規範的軟體測試的嚴謹性帶入AI安全。POLARIS首先將非結構化的自然語言政策編譯為一階邏輯（FOL）表示，建立高層規則與具體測試案例之間的可追溯鏈接。這種形式化使得構建語義政策圖成為可能，其中複雜的政策違規場景被編碼為可遍歷的路徑。通過系統地探索這個圖，POLARIS揭示了組合違規模式，這些模式隨後被實例化為可執行的自然語言測試查詢，實現基於覆蓋率的可重複安全測試。實驗表明，POLARIS相比於既有基準達到了更高的政策覆蓋率和攻擊成功次數。關鍵是，通過橋接形式方法與AI安全，POLARIS提供了一種原則性、自動化的方法，以確保LLMs遵循可驗證可追溯的安全關鍵政策。我們在 https://github.com/huac-lxy/POLARIS 上發布了我們的代碼。
2605.24883.author: Xiaoyue Lu et.al.
2605.24883.authors: Xiaoyue Lu, Xianglin Yang, Haijun Liu, Jiahao Liu, Kuntai Cai, Yan Xiao, Jin Song Dong
